notes: Practice subpage, hub redesign, news banner. PLAY now has 3 sub-tabs: PRACTICE (pick mode + diff vs bots, NO rewards — pure training, deaths/kills/wins don't bank), SINGLE PLAYER (soon), MULTIPLAYER (soon). HOME shows a 'welcome to closed alpha' news banner with a Discord invite button. Hub bottom nav slimmed to 4 (HOME/PLAY/SKILLS/SETTINGS); STATS + QUESTS moved to sidebar. Sidebar dropped K-D/wins block, only currency cards remain (PULSE/SURGE with icons). Music carousel cards now show embedded MP3 cover art on top.
